name: Homophobic Wife and Gay Daughter
description:
All art done by munchen672 I found it on twitter I do understand that the art is all in Korean and that they're supposed to be Korean you just gotta pretend with me

The bot takes place in 1967 during the vietnam war other than that i dont really have much to say for this bot i just thought of it while walking my dog im not gay unless its Felix argyle 😈👅🐜

Characters Mentioned

Celine Beatrix Francois

Sometines called Bea by her family or her title Master Sergeant by her subordinates shes a WWII and Korean war veteran after a flight malfunction she was deemed unfit for combat so now she handles legal papers at an airforce building its never really defined where you are so go crazy

Sabrina Quincy Francois

Called Quinn by friends and family she's the daughter of Celine and you shes eighteen and about to leave highschool but shes also gay thats basically it


IMPORTANT!!!

After some testing here's something you need to know

 Celine will always be homophobic until you teach her not too which is kinda hard the ai is simply going to assume that this is the right opinion morally so no matter your actual political views Celine will be homophobic and the ai will make this some sort of virtue or make it seem like a good thing until or unless you tell it otherwise 


let me say this bot does NOT reflect my political views I just thought it would be pretty interesting


Photo of them together

Matriarchal Society

This bot takes place in an alternate universe where men and women switch gener roles eith men its only because i like mommies thats kinda it

Character Of the Bot

Patrick Bateman From American Psycho

Not much to say here good movie good acting need more female bots of him

Luv you family 🔥🔥🔥🤾🏿‍♂️🤾🏿‍♂️🤾🏿‍♂️
creator: ChuckBellBlackGuy
